meta.title: TERRASOCIAL - Your land, your future | MANO VERDE INC SA
meta.description: TERRASOCIAL - Become a landowner in Cameroon with installment payments. Social land project by MANO VERDE INC SA.

alert.warning: TERRASOCIAL: land sales with installment payments by MANO VERDE INC SA. We are neither a bank nor a microfinance institution.

hero.title: Become an owner of your land in Cameroon
hero.description: Access land ownership through our installment payment system over 24 to 36 months. Quality plots in Yaoundé and surroundings.

lots.title: Our Available Plots
lots.description: Plots in development areas, legally secured and verified by our partner surveyors and notaries

howItWorks.title: 5 Steps to Your Land
howItWorks.description: A simple, fast and accessible process for everyone

steps.title: Choose your lot
steps.description: Select the area and location that suits you.

steps.title: Simulate your payment
steps.description: Calculate your monthly payments according to your budget. Application fee: 10,000 FCFA.

steps.title: Reserve and sign
steps.description: We prepare your contract. You receive your first documents.

steps.title: Pay at your own pace
steps.description: From 1,500 FCFA/day via Orange Money or MTN MoMo. Optional insurance +350 FCFA/day.

steps.title: Receive your title
steps.description: Land documents delivered progressively until the final land title.

payment.title: Payment Methods
payment.description: Multiple flexible options for your installments

transparency.title: Clarity and Trust
transparency.description: At TERRASOCIAL, you buy land and pay in installments. A clear, direct model with no surprises.
transparency.keyMessage: Our commitment: no interest rates, no hidden penalties, a clear signed contract, transparent monitoring until the land title is obtained. Access to ownership, simplified.
transparency.legalNote: TERRASOCIAL is a land sales platform. We do not provide credit or loans. Each transaction is based on a sales contract signed between the buyer and MANO VERDE INC SA.

cards.title: Legal Framework
cards.description: Real estate sale compliant with Cameroonian land law and the OHADA Uniform Act.

cards.title: Secured Land
cards.description: Land titles registered with the Land Registry. Verification by surveyors and notaries.

cards.title: Zero Hidden Fees
cards.description: Contract in clear language, fixed and transparent price, receipt for each payment.

cards.title: Secure Payments
cards.description: Via Orange Money, MTN MoMo or transfer. Each transaction is tracked and secured.

items.quote: With just 1,500 FCFA per day, I was able to buy a 200m² plot in Soa. The process was simple and transparent. Thank you TERRASOCIAL!
items.author: Jean-Pierre N. — Yaoundé

items.quote: The insurance at 350 FCFA/day reassured me. In case of a problem, my family is protected and my investment is secured.
items.author: Marie-Claire T. — Douala

items.quote: I live abroad and was able to follow the entire process online. The documents are clear and the team is very responsive.
items.author: Patrick M. — Paris, France

subscription.title: Reserve Your Lot Now
subscription.description: Fill out this form to start your journey to property ownership

form.source: How did you learn about TERRASOCIAL?
form.cgv: I have read and accept the Terms and Conditions of Sale and the Installment Payment Policy.
form.newsletter: I agree to receive TERRASOCIAL news and offers via SMS/WhatsApp

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Our team is available to answer all your questions

footer.disclaimer: TERRASOCIAL is a land sales service with installment payments managed by MANO VERDE INC SA. It is not a financial institution.
footer.company: A project of MANO VERDE INC SA - Cameroonian Public Company
footer.copyright: © 2026 TERRASOCIAL - MANO VERDE INC SA. All rights reserved.

legalNotice.full: TERRASOCIAL is a platform for land sales with installment payments, compliant with the Cameroonian Civil Code.
